quoteFirst: At that time they are again changed, the watch that had “eight hours out” having the “forenoon watch below,” from 8 till 12 M.; and in the afternoon the watch that had but “four hours out” the night before have the afternoon watch below, from 12 to 4 P.M. The time from
quoteLast: is divided into two short watches, called “dog-watches,” for the purpose of regulating or keeping them in proper succession.
